description: A property manager receives an emergency call at 10 PM from a tenant reporting a burst pipe.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the tenant on how to shut off the main water valve to the property to mitigate damage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides immediate, actionable instructions to the tenant.

nodes.task_description: Contact the 24/7 emergency plumber from the approved vendor list.

expected_outcome.value: An emergency plumber is dispatched to the property.

nodes.task_description: Create a high-priority work order in the system to track the incident and subsequent repairs.

expected_outcome.value: The emergency is officially logged and tracked in the management system.
